title: Incredibly Immersive
description: Vanilla style exploration modpack made to be as immersive as possible, with multiplayer in mind.
body:
![Incredibly Immersive Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/42b2ee7fde0e79f3881ffce0f4c73dba2bac88ac.png) _A calm, immersive modpack that aims to enhance the vanilla experience, whilst keeping things fresh._

This modpack is still in alpha. Do not expect it to be balanced or bug free.

### **Features** - New World Generation - New Structures - Immersive POV - Performance - Realistic Sounds and Ambience

### **Trailer:** Coming soon!

### **FAQ** **Q.** _Does Incredibly Immersive support multiplayer?_ **A.** Yes, Incredibly Immersive supports multiplayer, and is best played with friends! Simple Voice Chat and other mods have been included to enhance the multiplayer experience.
**Q.** _Where do I report bugs?_ **A.** In the Discord, in the #support channel under the Incredibly Immersive category.
**Q.** _What version does Incredibly Immersive support?_ **A.** Currently, Incredibly Immersive only supports 1.21.1, as this was a personal project. Many mods in Incredibly Immersive do not support past 1.21.1.
**Q.** _Why isn't [INSERT MOD] included?_ **A.** This was a personal project that my friends wanted me to show to the world. Thus it has mods that I wanted. You are free to add your own.
**Q.** _I have a bad pc, can I still run it?_ **A.** You can absolutely run Incredibly Immersive with a bad computer. I could run it with a 9-year-old computer, so you guys should be able to get it working too. If your pc is struggling, turn off Distant Horizons and Shaders. Otherwise, ask in #support in the Discord.

### Resouce Packs [Fresh Animations](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/fresh-animations)

### Known Bugs - Reese's Sodium Options crashes your game when you open Video Settings. Disable the mod to solve this. - Cape glitches into the player whilst running. Wavey Capes solves this issue. - MinecraftCapes capes do not render with Wavey Capes active. Disable to solve this issue (above bug comes back).

### Known Incompatibilities - Physics Mod Basic/Pro does not work.

**To Mod Authors:** If you have any problems with this modpack, whether it be the use of your mod/s or something else, don't hesitate to DM me on Discord (aqwek_). I am happy to talk about anything you need. NOT AN OFFICIAL MINECRAFT PRODUCT. NOT AFFILIATED OR ASSOCIATED WITH MICROSOFT OR MOJANG.
